question: Return the names of departments such that (a) at least one of the department's doctors has had at least one appointment, and (b) every patient ever seen by a doctor in that department is older than 60.
gold_sql: SELECT d.name FROM Departments d WHERE d.did IN (SELECT doc.did FROM Doctors doc JOIN Appointments a ON doc.doc_id = a.doc_id) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Patients p WHERE p.age <= 60 AND p.pid IN (SELECT pid FROM Appointments WHERE doc_id IN (SELECT doc_id FROM Doctors WHERE did = d.did)));
